mapper.sql: id, user_id, usage_type, object_key, thumbnail_object_key, display_object_key, audit_thumbnail_object_key, source_size_bytes, total_size_bytes, status, bound_type, bound_id, created_at, updated_at, expires_at
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM upload_object_do WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_size_bytes), 0) FROM upload_object_do WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM upload_object_do WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('UPLOADING', 'STAGED', 'DELETING')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_size_bytes), 0) FROM upload_object_do WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('UPLOADING', 'STAGED', 'DELETING')
SELECT FROM upload_object_do WHERE object_key = #{objectKey} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE upload_object_do SET thumbnail_object_key = #{thumbnailObjectKey}, display_object_key = #{displayObjectKey}, audit_thumbnail_object_key = #{auditThumbnailObjectKey}, total_size_bytes = #{totalSizeBytes}, status = 'STAGED', updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'UPLOADING'

UPDATE upload_object_do SET thumbnail_object_key = #{thumbnailObjectKey}, display_object_key = #{displayObjectKey}, audit_thumbnail_object_key = #{auditThumbnailObjectKey}, total_size_bytes = source_size_bytes + #{variantSizeBytes}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE object_key = #{objectKey} AND status IN ('STAGED', 'BOUND')
UPDATE upload_object_do SET status = 'BOUND', bound_type = #{boundType}, bound_id = #{boundId}, expires_at = NULL, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'STAGED'
UPDATE upload_object_do SET status = 'DELETING', expires_at = #{retryAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('UPLOADING', 'STAGED', 'BOUND', 'DELETING')
